message:
fix(web): comprehensive mobile UX improvements for iPhone

Addresses multiple mobile UI issues:

1. Viewport zoom prevention
   - Added maximum-scale=1 and user-scalable=no to prevent accidental
     pinch zoom and double-tap zoom on mobile

2. Horizontal scroll lock
   - Added overflow-x: hidden and overscroll-behavior-x: none to html/body
     in reset.css (applies to ALL browsers, not just iOS Safari)
   - Added touch-action: manipulation to prevent 300ms tap delay
   - Added max-width: 100vw containment to major layout containers

3. Fixed Quick Stats horizontal scroll
   - Removed negative margin that caused page-level horizontal scroll
   - Added overscroll-behavior-x: contain to keep scroll within component
   - Added scroll-snap-type for better UX
   - Hidden scrollbar for cleaner appearance

4. Fixed Phage Picker list overflow
   - Removed negative margin that caused horizontal overflow
   - Added -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch for smooth scrolling

5. Universal mobile scroll prevention
   - Added @media (max-width: 1024px) block that applies overflow
     containment to all major UI containers on mobile/tablet

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,13 +3,16 @@
   <head>
     <meta charset="UTF-8" />
     <!-- viewport-fit=cover enables safe-area-inset-* CSS env() values for iPhone notch/Dynamic Island -->
-    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, viewport-fit=cover" />
+    <!-- maximum-scale=1 prevents accidental pinch-zoom; user-scalable=no prevents double-tap zoom -->
+    <!-- Note: This slightly reduces accessibility but provides expected mobile app behavior -->
+    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no, viewport-fit=cover" />
     <meta name="description" content="Phage Explorer: Terminal-style visualization for bacteriophage genomes" />
     <!-- iOS Safari theme color for address bar -->
     <meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0f" media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" />
     <meta name="theme-color" content="#f0f0f8" media="(prefers-color-scheme: light)" />
     <!-- iOS PWA: enable standalone mode when added to home screen -->
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
+    <meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent" />
     <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="Phage Explorer" />
     <!-- Prevent telephone number detection on iOS -->
@@ -26,4 +29,3 @@
     <script type="module" src="/src/main.tsx"></script>
   </body>
 </html>
